title: Guillermo del Toro, Kris Bowers and More Elected to Expanded 60-Member Film Academy Board of Governors
summary: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has announced the newly elected Board of Governors for the 2026-2027 term year. The new board is comprised of a mixture of new faces to the board, like director Guillermo del Toro and composer Kris Bowers, returning incumbents like actor Lou Diamond P…
